testcase.name: Automation practice flows @regression › should complete the sample form @smoke
Automation practice flows @regression › should open the external popup page
Automation practice flows @regression › should update the date picker value
Automation practice flows @regression › should select a country by label
Automation practice flows @regression › should verify the Selenium book row
Login flow @smoke @regression › should login with the configured valid user
Login flow @smoke @regression › should display the login form controls
Playwright docs smoke @smoke › should load the documentation landing page
Playwright docs smoke @smoke › should open the getting started guide
